subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Threshold of the Blessed Beauty! Jinab-i-Shukuhi hath offered praise beyond description that flameth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان جمال مبارک جناب شکوهی ستایشی زایدالوصف از آنجناب نمود که شعله
subcodes.subjects: @mystical themes, @praise and encouragement, @firmness in the Covenant, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @love of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
